variants.name: Drop Cap
variants.html:
Once upon a time in the land of web development, there was a CSS-only drop cap that transformed the first letter of the opening paragraph into an elegant oversized initial, drawing the reader into the story with editorial sophistication.

Subsequent paragraphs are styled normally without the drop cap effect.

variants.name: Phone Mask
variants.html:
<label>Phone number
  <input type="text" data-mask="phone" placeholder="(555) 123-4567">
</label>
variants.setup: await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); const i = document.querySelector("input[data-mask]"); if (i) { i.value = "(555) 123-4567"; }

<label>Card number
  <input type="text" data-mask="credit-card" placeholder="#### #### #### ####">
</label>
variants.setup: await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); const i = document.querySelector("input[data-mask]"); if (i) { i.value = "4242 4242 4242 4242"; }

  <input type="text" data-mask="date" placeholder="MM/DD/YYYY">

variants.setup: await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); const i = document.querySelector("input[data-mask]"); if (i) { i.value = "02/27/2026"; }

variants.name: Drawer (Bottom)
variants.html:
Bottom Sheet

A bottom sheet that slides up from the bottom of the viewport. Common on mobile interfaces for actions or additional content.

variants.name: Drawer (End)
variants.html:
Side Drawer

A drawer that slides in from the end (right in LTR) of the viewport.

Commonly used for settings panels, filters, or navigation menus.

variants.name: Large Dialog
variants.html:
Large Dialog

A spacious dialog suitable for forms, detailed content, or complex interactions that need more room.

The large variant expands the maximum width to 48rem, providing ample space for content.

variants.html:
Small Dialog

A compact dialog for simple confirmations or short messages.

variants.name: Code Block
variants.html:
function debounce(fn, delay) {
  let timer;
  return function (...args) {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => fn.apply(this, args), delay);
  };
}

A design system built on native HTML elements and CSS custom properties. No JavaScript framework required.

variants.name: Accordion Group
variants.html:
Getting Started

Install via CDN or npm. No build step required.

Customising Tokens

All design tokens are CSS custom properties on :root. Override them in your stylesheet.

Browser Support

Targets evergreen browsers with graceful degradation where possible.

variants.html:
The Web was invented by Tim Berners-LeeTim Berners-Lee created the World Wide Web in 1989 at CERN. as a system for scientists.

HTML provides semantic structureHTML stands for HyperText Markup Language. for web documents.

CSS enables stylingCascading Style Sheets separate content from presentation. without polluting markup.

variants.name: Stacked
variants.html: <form class="stacked" onsubmit="return false"><label for="ev-f-name">Name</label><input type="text" id="ev-f-name" placeholder="Your name"><label for="ev-f-email">Email</label><input type="email" id="ev-f-email" placeholder="you@example.com"><label for="ev-f-msg">Message</label><textarea id="ev-f-msg" rows="3" placeholder="Your message"></textarea><footer class="actions end"><button type="button" class="secondary">Cancel</button><button type="submit">Send</button></footer></form>

variants.name: Inline
variants.html: <form class="inline" onsubmit="return false"><label for="ev-f-search" class="visually-hidden">Search</label><input type="search" id="ev-f-search" placeholder="Search…"><button type="submit">Search</button></form>

variants.name: Grid
variants.html: <form class="grid" onsubmit="return false"><label for="ev-f-first">First Name</label><input type="text" id="ev-f-first"><label for="ev-f-last">Last Name</label><input type="text" id="ev-f-last"><label for="ev-f-phone">Phone</label><input type="tel" id="ev-f-phone"><label for="ev-f-company">Company</label><input type="text" id="ev-f-company"></form>

variants.name: With Hint

variants.name: With Error
variants.html: <form-field><label for="ev-ff-pw">Password</label><input id="ev-ff-pw" type="password" required aria-invalid="true" aria-describedby="ev-ff-pw-err"><output id="ev-ff-pw-err" class="error" for="ev-ff-pw" style="visibility:visible">Password must be at least 8 characters.</output></form-field>
